POP LUNCH - Rupaul performs "Supermodel" live from Spring Break '93
videos.description: Join Supermodel-of-the-World RuPaul, "Blossom" star Joey Lawrence and comedian Gilbert Gottfried as they crown the king and queen of MTV's Spring Break 1993. Yes, it's "Beauty & The Beach," as hosted by Ed Lover and Vanessa A. Williams.

videos.title: RuPaul: You Better Work | How I Made It | CNBC
videos.description:
